invariant: get_daily_readiness returns an explicit no-meetings empty state when the requested day has no meetings or claims.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = get_daily_readiness returns no meetings, no focus items, and the no_meetings empty state for 2026-05-15.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Defines meetings and claims tables and intentionally leaves them empty.
fixture_design_notes.inputs: Daily readiness request for the empty day.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: No meetings, focus items, or overnight changes.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: No source attribution because no meetings or claim-backed fields exist.
